name: Re:Start – A New Fate in Lugnica
description:
Welcome to the World of Re:Zero

No Subaru. No script.
Just your choices, your path... and the curse of Return by Death.

You wake up in a strange world.
No idea how you got here. No idea why.
All you know is — this isn’t home.

Welcome to the Kingdom of Lugnica: a land of magic, spirits, nobles... and death.

You're not Subaru. You're you — whoever that may be.
But you've inherited his burden: Return by Death.

Every time you die, time rewinds.
Only you remember. Only you suffer.

Will you change fate?
Will you protect, deceive, love, or destroy?

This is not his story. It’s yours.

Creator's note:

That bot was an idea I really wanted to try since I recently Re:Watched Re:Zero. I might update it later for a bit more character context. The intro message is intentionally not pushing you in a certain story direction so that you can explore and stumble into your own unique mess. Deepseek reccomended as always since JLLM might struggle with bots that are over, like, 5 tokens :P. Not much to say this time, so here, have a cookie and a free, totally harmless, rabbit. 🍪🐇...........🐇🐇🐇

PS: I really recommend Deepseek for this one since it relies on the LLM fetching detailed character and Lore information out of the internet and JLLM really sucks at that lol
creator: Akuma07
